_status: SUPERSEDED — archived for provenance only; NOT active tooling.
_superseded_by: Amendment 03 (parameterization-coherence correction of the search region)
_reason: Heterogeneous parameterization: per-variable extrema were pooled across Rao Table 1 (spherical, 6 variables in radians, r = pi/2 - h) and Table 3 (plane, 5 variables as lengths, r = 1). Spherical radian values and plane length values do not share a coordinate system, so the pooled box does not describe a region in plane-variable space, and it conflicts with the units of r fixed in section 7 of the pre-registration.
_non_reproducible: No single rule generates these literals: b and g equal the all-14-row pooled maximum (keep-largest); c, d, e equal the all-14-row pooled range with each variable's single largest value dropped (drop-largest). Audited against the engine's hash-pinned Tables 1 and 3.
_lower_bounds_note: Lower bounds were positivity clamps at 1e-6, placing the box against the degenerate corner (b+c+d, c+d+e, d+g -> 0), which is the direct cause of the enumeration runaway observed before the correction.
_replacement: enumeration/B.json (B_plane), produced deterministically by enumeration/generate_B.py from Rao Table 3 only.
